{{Infobox technique
| name = Striker binding
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Striker]] [[binding]] is a crystallized technique that serves as the essential core of any [[construct]]. While [[scripts]] act as drawings, bindings are compared to three-dimensional statues or pearls, representing the heart and soul of a creation. Without a [[binding]], a [[construct]] possesses only the inherent properties of its materials and any added [[scripts]]; with one, it gains the ability to execute specific techniques. These bindings are often made of arcane materials and can vary significantly in shape, such as spiraling drills or organic, star-like forms with multiple apertures. In combat, [[Striker techniques]] are primarily used for offensive purposes, often manifesting as projectiles like beams of light, fireballs, or elemental bursts. They can also take the form of physical strikes, such as a pulse of [[madra]] or sweeping waves of energy. The effectiveness and nature of a technique depend on how the user cycles their [[madra]] through the [[binding]]. Some advanced bindings are capable of absorbing or draining [[madra]] from victims, while others can be integrated into specialized weapons like launchers. While most bindings perform a single function, rare examples exist where multiple techniques have organically fused into one. [[Soulsmiths]] can also link several bindings together within a single [[construct]] to create powerful, albeit unstable and spiritually loud, compound effects.}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]]'s [[Striker binding]] is thin as a razor.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Striker binding]] is a type of technique used in constructs.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The security constructs in one room possess the power of [[Striker]] bindings.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A compound launcher construct can use six [[Striker]] bindings at once.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Striker]] bindings can be triggered in swords to produce blue crackling light.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] triggers the [[Striker binding]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blighted Sky]] contains a [[Striker binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
